fixes.origin:
String sql = "SELECT * from USERS where USERNAME='foo' and PASSWORD='" + credentialInput + "'";
org.securitylab.suitecode.helpers.DatabaseHelper.JDBCtemplate.execute(sql);
fixes.replacement:
String sql = "SELECT * from USERS where USERNAME=? and PASSWORD=?";
org.securitylab.suitecode.helpers.DatabaseHelper.JDBCtemplate.update(sql, "foo", credentialInput);

static_findings.message: Possible SQL injection: SQL query variable "sql" appears to be built unsafely before execution.
static_findings.evidence: String sql = "SELECT * from USERS where USERNAME='foo' and PASSWORD='" + credentialInput + "'"
